channel.title: Home Lab on Pete Wall
channel.description: Recent content in Home Lab on Pete Wall

item.title: Banishing Ghosts
item.description: Why I retired my Ghost-on-Kubernetes blog in favor of a static Hugo site.

item.title: Cattle Cluster
item.description: When my cluster went down and how I didn’t fix it.

item.title: Summoning Ghosts
item.description: Where I describe the process of deploying this blog software.

item.title: Home Lab #6: Quick update about volumes
item.description: The continuing troubles with the SSD drives in my home lab machines.

item.title: Home Lab Build - #5 Deploying the Platform
item.description: Installing the Kubernetes software platform on my home lab and some fixes along the way.

item.title: Home Lab Build - #4 M.2 Drive Struggles
item.description: The challenges of getting the M.2 drives working and the dumb reason why.

item.title: Home Lab Build - #3 Updating the BIOS/UEFI
item.description: Getting the firmware up to date on the hardware for the home lab.

item.title: Home Lab Build - #2 Installing the Hard Drive
item.description: The hard drives that are going into the new hardware for the home lab.

item.title: Home Lab Build - #1 New Hardware
item.description: About the computers I chose to buy to start my new home lab.

item.title: Home Lab Build - #0 Current State
item.description: The history and current state of my home lab, and why it’s time to change it.
